objective: Implement P4 release suite runner contracts for golden regression, integration gate coverage, and release suite report shape without package publishing or lock writes.
implemented_capabilities: Shared suite reports include suite_id, run_id, command, input_hashes, upstream_lock_refs, status, findings, exit_code, started_at, finished_at, and self-excluding report_hash.
Golden suite compares expected and actual output hashes deterministically and blocks golden update requests for Human Gate instead of rewriting expected outputs.
Integration suite verifies CLI/adapters/program-driver/recovery/Human-Gate/lock-gate/write-scope coverage and blocks gate bypasses.
Release suite report shape requires package dry-run, example smoke, migration coverage, and release readiness evidence hashes while refusing package publish and release-lock actions.
Suite report validation rejects non-sha256 report_hash values and non-sha256 input_hashes.
Suite run_id generation binds input hash keys and values so input drift changes the run identity.
Golden suite blocks invalid expected or actual output hash shapes as unsafe instead of reporting PASS.
Integration suite blocks non-machine-readable command payload shapes for written_paths, findings, and exit_code.
Release suite blocks invalid evidence hash shapes as unsafe instead of treating them as passing evidence.
approval_notes: Approved by explicit user pass after P4-IMPL-03 candidate review.
This approval covers the P4 release suite runner contract implementation candidate only.
This approval does not authorize P4-IMPL-04, P4-IMPL-05, P4_BUILD_LOCK, DRD_HARNESS_RELEASE_LOCK, package publishing, or root P4 phase file updates.
